metadata.description: Netdust harness plugins — core (cross-stack discipline, hooks, memory), wp (WordPress framework knowledge), statamic (Statamic 6 + Peak). Stack-agnostic core; layered WP + Statamic plugins.

plugins.name: netdust-core
plugins.description: Netdust harness core — memory + hooks + cross-stack skills (research, marketing, brand-voice, code-audit, shake-out, testing-workflow, test-effectiveness, secure-server, ploi, dev-stack) + 7 code-reviewer agents + 9-method /deploy + /integration + /shakeout + ploi MCP. Stack-agnostic. Layered on by netdust-wp, netdust-statamic.

plugins.name: netdust-agent
plugins.description: Netdust two-layer agent harness — a SKELETON layer (gates/steps/ordering: harnessed-development sequencer + threat-modeling, architecture-invariants, testing-workflow, feature-acceptance, test-effectiveness, shake-out) and a CRAFT layer (gerund-named how-to the harness reaches for: writing-tests, designing-apis, building-frontend, engineering-context, versioning-with-git, driving-the-browser, refining-ideas, sourcing-from-docs, doubting-decisions, simplifying-code, deploying). Naming: gerund = craft (how), gate-noun = harness (when/whether). Craft layers ON TOP of superpowers (never replaces it); addyosmani/agent-skills (MIT) concepts folded in. Standalone; intended to replace the harness pieces of netdust-core.

plugins.name: netdust-wp
plugins.description: Netdust WordPress plugin — WP discipline, WP planning (plan-requirements gate), WP reference, ntdst-core framework, WP commands. Layers on netdust-core.

plugins.name: netdust-statamic
plugins.description: Netdust Statamic plugin — Statamic 6 + Peak skills, build playbook, shake-out, scaffolding commands. Layers on netdust-core.
